overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2, featuring an Ultramarine in blue power armor battling Tyranid aliens in a dark gothic industrial interior. The player engages in melee and ranged combat, interacts with weapon stations to acquire Heavy Bolter and Melta Rifle, and approaches a large energy portal with a squadmate.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic industrial combat arena with metal platforms

events.description: engaging Tyranid warriors in close-quarters melee combat with chainsword
advancing toward the large energy portal structure in the distance

agents.ego_description: fighting multiple Tyranid aliens with melee attacks while traversing the industrial platform

notable_agents.action: Tyranid warrior lunging at the player with scything talons

entered.detail: gothic sci-fi metal flooring with drainage grates and industrial panels
tall dark metal industrial buildings with ornate gothic detailing
decorative pillars with burning candles providing ambient light
dead alien creatures scattered across the metal floor

segments.scene_description: The player character, an Ultramarine Space Marine, engages in intense melee combat with Tyranid creatures on a dark industrial metal platform. Gothic architecture looms in the background while candle-lit pillars provide flickering illumination. Dead aliens litter the ground as the player advances toward a distant energy portal.

scene_state.functional_zone: energy portal chamber with glowing blue warp gate

events.description: approaching the large circular energy portal with swirling blue and purple energy
firing bolter weapon at the energy portal structure
turning back to engage approaching Tyranids in melee combat

agents.ego_description: firing at the portal then switching to melee against Tyranids with chainsword attacks

notable_agents.action: large Tyranid creature emerging from behind portal machinery

entered.detail: massive circular warp gate with swirling blue energy and electrical discharges

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a massive energy portal emitting bright blue light in the industrial chamber. After firing at the structure, the character turns to engage more Tyranids in brutal melee combat. The environment shifts as the camera orients toward the portal, revealing new gothic machinery.

scene_state.functional_zone: weapon station area with heavy bolter emplacement

events.description: interacting with weapon station to acquire Heavy Bolter
taking cover behind pillar to fire heavy weapon at distant enemies
firing Heavy Bolter with yellow tracer rounds at Tyranids

agents.ego_description: acquiring Heavy Bolter from weapon station and providing suppressing fire against distant Tyranid targets

notable_agents.action: Tyranid creature taking cover behind industrial structure

entered.detail: glass-encased weapon rack displaying Heavy Bolter with holographic interface

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a weapon station and acquires a Heavy Bolter, a large rotary cannon. Taking cover behind gothic pillars, the Space Marine fires streams of yellow tracer rounds at distant Tyranid enemies. The industrial platform stretches out with scattered cover points.

scene_state.functional_zone: secondary weapon station with melta rifle

events.description: interacting with weapon station to swap Heavy Bolter for Melta Rifle
moving away from station with newly acquired Melta Rifle

agents.ego_description: swapping heavy weapon for Melta Rifle at the weapon station and preparing to advance

entered.detail: weapon station displaying Melta Rifle with holographic weapon display

segments.scene_description: The player moves to a second weapon station and exchanges the Heavy Bolter for a Melta Rifle, a specialized anti-armor weapon. The area is temporarily clear of enemies as the character prepares the new weapon and begins moving back toward the portal area.

events.description: approaching the energy portal alongside allied Space Marine
collecting ammunition from supply crate near the portal

agents.ego_description: advancing toward the energy portal alongside a fellow Space Marine, collecting ammunition from a supply crate

notable_agents.action: allied Space Marine advancing alongside player toward the portal

entered.detail: large active warp gate with intense blue energy discharges
yellow supply crate with ammunition reserves

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the energy portal again, now accompanied by an allied Space Marine. The area features candle-lit pillars and scattered alien corpses. The player collects ammunition from a yellow supply crate positioned near the portal while the energy gate crackles with blue energy in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark gothic industrial complex as a Space Marine battles through alien hordes toward a glowing energy portal. It begins with intense melee combat on a metal platform amidst flickering candle-lit pillars and the corpses of fallen Tyranids. As the camera advances toward the bright blue light of a massive portal, the scene shifts to a series of weapon stations where the warrior acquires a Heavy Bolter to fire tracer rounds from behind gothic cover before exchanging it for a Melta Rifle. The perspective then tracks the character as they navigate the industrial platform, moving through a temporary lull in the fighting to return toward the energy gate. Finally, the shot concludes as the Space Marine, now joined by an ally, collects ammunition from a yellow supply crate while the portal crackles with energy in the background.
